title: Floor Sanders and Finishers
description: Scrape and sand wooden floors to smooth surfaces using floor scraper and floor sanding machine, and apply coats of finish.

tasks.text: Buff and vacuum floors to ensure their cleanliness prior to the application of finish.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Scrape and sand floor edges and areas inaccessible to floor sanders, using scrapers, disk-type sanders, and sandpaper.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attach sandpaper to rollers of sanding machines.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Guide sanding machines over surfaces of floors until surfaces are smooth.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Apply filler compound and coats of finish to floors to seal wood.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove excess glue from joints, using knives, scrapers, or wood chisels.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
